mapper.select: SELECT r.id,r.name,r.description,r.material,r.image_path as imagePath,GROUP_CONCAT(i.icon_path SEPARATOR ',') AS iconPath from zubora_recipes r LEFT JOIN icons i ON r.material LIKE CONCAT('%', i.icon_name, '%') GROUP BY r.id

SELECT r.id,r.name,r.description,r.material,r.image_path as imagePath,GROUP_CONCAT(i.icon_path SEPARATOR ',') AS iconPath from zubora_recipes r LEFT JOIN icons i ON r.material LIKE CONCAT('%', i.icon_name, '%') where r.id=#{id} GROUP BY r.id
